description: Master registry of all installed agent skills

stitch-design.description: Core design workflows for creating, managing, and optimizing designs within Stitch

generate-design.name: stitch::generate-design
generate-design.description: Generate new screens from text prompts or images, edit existing screens, generate design variants

extract-design-md.name: stitch::extract-design-md
extract-design-md.description: Extract design systems from frontend source code (React, Vue, Svelte, Angular, etc.)

manage-design-system.name: stitch::manage-design-system
manage-design-system.description: Create/update design systems in Stitch, apply to screens

code-to-design.name: stitch::code-to-design
code-to-design.description: Convert frontend code to Stitch Design via HTML extraction + design system + upload

upload-to-stitch.name: stitch::upload-to-stitch
upload-to-stitch.description: Upload local assets (images, mockups, HTML) to a Stitch project

extract-static-html.name: stitch::extract-static-html
extract-static-html.description: Extract self-contained static HTML from web applications

stitch-build.description: Build and component skills for converting Stitch designs into production code

react-components.name: react:components
react-components.description: Convert Stitch designs into modular Vite + React components

react-native.name: stitch::react-native
react-native.description: Convert Stitch designs to React Native components with StyleSheet

remotion.name: remotion
remotion.description: Generate walkthrough videos from Stitch projects using Remotion

shadcn-ui.name: shadcn-ui
shadcn-ui.description: Expert guidance for building with shadcn/ui components

stitch-utilities.description: Utility and helper skills for prompt enhancement, design analysis, and autonomous building

design-md.name: design-md
design-md.description: Analyze Stitch projects and synthesize semantic design systems into DESIGN.md

enhance-prompt.name: enhance-prompt
enhance-prompt.description: Transform vague UI ideas into polished, Stitch-optimized prompts

stitch-loop.name: stitch-loop
stitch-loop.description: Autonomous iterative website building with baton-passing loop pattern

taste-design.name: taste-design
taste-design.description: Premium anti-generic DESIGN.md generation with strict typography, color, and layout standards
